channel.title: Perran Moon MP
channel.description: Labour Member of Parliament for for Camborne Redruth & Hayle

item.title: The Cornishman – Geothermal 02/03/2026
item.dc:creator: Perran Moon
item.description:
Last week at United Downs, I attended the opening of the UK’s first ever geothermal power plant – another historic first for Cornwall. Although the launch date clashed with a...

The post The Cornishman – Geothermal 02/03/2026 appeared first on Perran Moon MP.

item.title: The Voice – SEND 02/03/2026
item.dc:creator: Perran Moon
item.description:
Last week the Labour Government launched the long-awaited Special Educational Needs and Disabilities (SEND) White Paper, detailing proposals from the Government to revolutionise the shattered SEND system that was inherited...

The post The Voice – SEND 02/03/2026 appeared first on Perran Moon MP.

item.title: Cornishman – Iran 09/03/2026
item.dc:creator: Perran Moon
item.description:
As I write this, international oil and gas prices are soaring. As well as the very obvious humanitarian impacts and the risks that our brave service personnel are now facing,...

The post Cornishman – Iran 09/03/2026 appeared first on Perran Moon MP.

item.title: The Voice – St Piran’s Day 09/03/2026
item.dc:creator: Perran Moon
item.description:
